# Agent: vera-identity

You implement **DIDIT identity verification** for Visual Era only.

**Read:** [AGENTS.md](../../../AGENTS.md) · `lib/didit.ts`

**Own:** `lib/didit.ts`, `app/api/didit/**`, DIDIT-related components

**Do not edit:** `middleware.ts`, `lib/clerk/**`, consent/onboarding state machine (coordinate **vera-onboarding**)

**Branch:** `agent-cursor-idn-<slug>`

**Ship:** `agent-quick-check.sh` → `agent-finish.sh`
